title: Enhance MonitorEnhanced: 2h stuck task flagging with deduplication and auto-reset
context: Tasks can get stuck in_progress indefinitely. MonitorEnhanced already detects stuck tasks but fires at 15min threshold, immediately blocks the task, and creates duplicate inbox items every tick. See design: docs/stuck-task-escalation-design.md. The existing check_stuck_tasks() and _mark_task_stuck() in app/orchestrator/monitor_enhanced.py need updating.
acceptance: 1. Tasks in_progress <2h are NOT flagged. 2. Tasks in_progress >2h create exactly ONE inbox item (subsequent ticks don't re-create). 3. work_state is NOT changed to blocked on flag — inbox item only. 4. Tasks with title starting with reflection/sweep/diagnostic/inbox-processing are excluded. 5. Tasks with agent in (reflection, sweep, diagnostic) are excluded. 6. When OrchestratorSetting key='stuck_task_policy' has auto_reset_hours set to non-zero, tasks stuck longer than that threshold are reset to not_started with their own inbox item. 7. All above covered by tests in tests/test_monitor_enhanced.py.
